name: 9anime
author: IzzatHasboloah
payload: class AnimeProvider { async search(query) { try { const response = await fetch(`https://9anime.me.uk/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`); const text = await response.text(); const results = []; const regex = /]*>([^<]+)/g; let match; while ((match = regex.exec(text)) !== null) { results.push({ id: match[1], title: match[2], url: `https://9anime.me.uk/anime/${match[1]}` }); } return results; } catch (error) { console.error('Search error:', error); return []; } } async getEpisodes(animeId) { try { const response = await fetch(`https://9anime.me.uk/anime/${animeId}`); const text = await response.text(); const episodes = []; const regex = /ep-(\d+)/g; let match; while ((match = regex.exec(text)) !== null) { episodes.push({ number: parseInt(match[1]), id: `${animeId}-${match[1]}` }); } return episodes; } catch (error) { console.error('Episodes error:', error); return []; } } async getStream(episodeId) { try { const response = await fetch(`https://9anime.me.uk/stream/${episodeId}`); const data = await response.json(); return { url: data.videoUrl, quality: data.quality || 'auto', subtitles: data.subtitles || [] }; } catch (error) { console.error('Stream error:', error); return null; } } } const provider = new AnimeProvider(); module.exports = provider;
